finding: Malformed regex in dispatch-rules.json -> uncaught re.error crashes the gate (re.search outside the JSON-load try).
recommendation: try/except re.error -> FAIL; or validate at _load_dispatch_rules.

finding: budget_manager imports fcntl unconditionally -> ImportError on Windows; breaks check_budget via subprocess.
recommendation: Guard import; no-op lock fallback on Windows.

finding: release.py _load_phase_completed: completed as dict (not list) -> AttributeError not in except tuple -> raw traceback.
recommendation: Add AttributeError to except, or validate list before iterating.

finding: budget_manager get_tier KeyError when budget.json parses but lacks session/config keys (quarantine only on parse failure).
recommendation: Shape-validate required keys; treat missing as corrupt -> defaults.

finding: check_markdown_schemas indexes v['file'/'schema'/'message'] with plain subscripts -> KeyError if violation dict lacks a key.
tier_description plain dict subscript -> KeyError on unexpected tier string incl. 'UNKNOWN' fallback.
install.py read_text() omits encoding at 4 sites -> locale-dependent decode of non-ASCII.
release.py group_by_class drops items whose change_class not in _ORDER from 'groups' output (bump still correct).
check_pr_template module-level ERRORS only cleared in main(); direct check_* calls accumulate.
recommendation: Clear per public function or pass ERRORS in.

finding: _count_command_behaviours toggles in_fence on either ```/~~~ regardless of opener -> miscounts mixed-fence docs.
recommendation: Track opening fence char/length per CommonMark.

finding: budget_manager record accepts negative n -> decrements invocations below zero.
budget/queue use separate locks; cmd_status reads both unlocked -> transient inconsistency.
recommendation: Take both locks in fixed order or document independence.

finding: _load_work_items_local adds None to live_ids when item id is JSON null (item.get('id','') returns None).
_set_hedl_state_backend writes hedl.toml via write_text (non-atomic); SIGKILL mid-write corrupts.
